top_signals.title: Generation Mining nears C$1 billion copper project funding
top_signals.summary: “With permitting and most of the financing complete, Generation is in good position to move the project forward,” analyst says.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Bitcoin rout leads Strategy’s STRC to slide 26% below par as MSTR shares hits 16-month low
top_signals.summary: For the past year, Strategy has been issuing and tapping preferred securities like STRC to raise capital for additional bitcoin purchases.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: ON Semiconductor strikes $7 billion deal for Synaptics in physical AI push
top_signals.summary: ON Semiconductor said the deal bumps up its total addressable market by $30 billion, to $243 billion by 2030.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: The Afghanistan Reckoning
top_signals.summary: Forever wars and the costs of collective forgetting.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: House backs $1.55 billion to revive E-7 Wedgetail, spares Navy Hawkeye
top_signals.summary: The White House budget office wants to raid a Navy radar-plane account and a classified Air Force line to pull the E-7 Wedgetail back from the dead.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Goldsky closes Agnico deal to become sole owner of Swedish project
top_signals.summary: The gold explorer announced in January its intention to buy a 55% interest in the Barsele property from Agnico.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.
